title: Laser Treatment Penang | Aesthetic Clinic Georgetown
meta: Laser Treatment at CANVAS Medical Clinic in Georgetown Penang. Physician-led Pico laser, laser resurfacing and laser hair removal at our Gurney Walk clinic. Book a consultation.
h1: Laser Treatment in Penang | CANVAS Medical Clinic
lead: Physician-led laser skin treatment at our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town — from PicoStar pico laser for pigmentation to Dermablate resurfacing and laser hair removal, matched to your skin by qualified doctors.
what: Laser treatment uses precisely calibrated light energy to address pigmentation, uneven tone, texture and unwanted hair. At CANVAS Medical Clinic in George Town, Penang, every laser session is selected and supervised by our physicians so the device, wavelength and settings suit your individual skin.

Our laser suite at Gurney Walk includes the PicoStar pico laser for pigment and tone, and the Dermablate cool laser for resurfacing. Treatments are tailored to your concern rather than applied off-the-shelf.
how: Consultation & skin assessment. A CANVAS physician examines your skin, reviews your history and confirms whether laser is appropriate for you.
Device & settings selection. The wavelength, energy and pulse are chosen for your concern and skin tone — pico laser for pigment, resurfacing for texture.
Treatment. The handpiece delivers controlled light energy to the target area. Most patients describe a warm, tingling sensation; numbing cream is used where needed.
Aftercare & review. We guide you on sun protection and recovery, and plan any follow-up sessions for gradual, natural results.
benefits: Pigment correction
Targets sunspots, melasma-prone areas and uneven tone with pico-second precision.
Renewed texture
Resurfacing helps soften the look of pores, fine lines and acne scarring over a series.
Brighter, even tone
Laser toning supports a clearer, more luminous complexion across many skin types.
Hair reduction
Laser hair removal offers a long-term approach to smoother, lower-maintenance skin.
whoIntro: Laser treatment suits a wide range of concerns, but suitability is always confirmed at consultation. You may be a good candidate if you are looking to:
who: • Address pigmentation, sunspots or an uneven complexion
• Improve skin texture, enlarged-looking pores or acne scarring
• Brighten dull skin and restore a more even tone
• Reduce unwanted hair with a longer-term solution
• Begin a maintenance plan for healthier-looking skin
whyIntro: At CANVAS Medical Clinic, laser treatment is delivered by qualified, LCP-certified physicians — never handed to an unsupervised operator. We treat a broad range of skin types common to Penang and tailor every protocol to you.

Our clinic sits at Gurney Walk in the heart of George Town, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and the adjacent Gurney Plaza. We follow a less-is-more philosophy: gradual, natural-looking results over a planned series.
why: LCP-certified physicians plan and supervise every laser session
Advanced platforms — PicoStar pico laser and Dermablate resurfacing
Protocols suited to diverse skin tones seen across Penang
Central Gurney Walk location in George Town with easy parking
Honest, realistic expectations set at consultation
faqs: Is laser treatment safe for my skin type?

Laser can be suitable for many skin tones, but the right device and settings matter. At your consultation a CANVAS physician assesses your skin and selects an appropriate protocol — safety is always confirmed before treatment.
How many laser sessions will I need?

It depends on your concern. Pigmentation and toning are usually treated over a series of sessions spaced a few weeks apart, while some texture goals need fewer. Your physician will outline a realistic plan at consultation.
Is there downtime after laser?
Laser toning and pico treatments typically have little downtime, while resurfacing may involve 3–7 days of recovery with some redness or flaking. Your physician will advise you fully beforehand.
Does laser treatment hurt?
Most patients feel a warm, tingling or light snapping sensation. Numbing cream is applied for more intensive treatments to keep you comfortable throughout.
Where is your laser clinic in Penang?
We are at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang. Covered parking is available at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
procDesc: Physician-led laser skin treatment in George Town, Penang for pigmentation, resurfacing, skin toning and hair removal using pico laser and resurfacing platforms.
howPerformed: A qualified physician selects the laser wavelength and settings for the patient's skin and concern, then delivers controlled light energy to the target area over one or more sessions.
prep: Avoid sun exposure and tanning before treatment and disclose medications. Your physician will advise on stopping certain topicals beforehand.
followup: Sun protection and a guided skincare routine; further sessions are planned in series for gradual results.
ctaText: Book a consultation with our physicians at Gurney Walk and we'll assess your skin, explain your options and design a laser plan that's entirely yours.

title: HIFU Treatment Penang | Ultrasound Lifting Georgetown

h1: HIFU Treatment in Penang | CANVAS Medical Clinic
lead: Non-surgical lifting and skin tightening at our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town — HIFU directs focused ultrasound energy deep beneath the skin to support a firmer, more lifted contour, supervised by qualified physicians.
what: HIFU (High-Intensity Focused Ultrasound) is a non-surgical treatment that delivers focused ultrasound energy to the deeper layers of the skin to encourage tightening and lift. At CANVAS Medical Clinic in George Town, Penang, HIFU is performed under physician supervision as a considered alternative to surgical lifting.
Our ultrasound platforms include Ultherapy, Ultraformer MPT and LinearZ, allowing your physician to target the face, jawline and neck with precision.
how: Consultation & mapping. A CANVAS physician assesses your skin laxity and maps the areas that will benefit most from focused ultrasound.
Depth selection. The device is set to reach specific tissue depths, delivering energy precisely where support is needed.
Treatment. Ultrasound energy is delivered in lines across the target area, prompting a natural tightening response in the deeper layers.
Gradual lift. Results build over the following weeks to months as the skin responds; your physician schedules any review.
benefits: Non-surgical lift
Supports a firmer, more lifted appearance without incisions or general anaesthesia.
Targeted tightening
Focused depth control treats the face, jawline and neck precisely.
Minimal downtime
Most patients return to daily activities the same day.
Gradual, natural results
Tightening develops progressively for a refreshed, undone look.
whoIntro: HIFU suits patients with mild to moderate skin laxity who prefer a non-surgical approach. Suitability is confirmed at consultation. You may be a good candidate if you wish to:
who: • Address early sagging along the jawline, cheeks or neck
• Firm and tighten skin without surgery or downtime
• Support a more defined facial contour
• Maintain results from previous lifting treatments
• Explore a non-invasive alternative before considering surgery
whyIntro: At CANVAS Medical Clinic, HIFU is planned and supervised by LCP-certified physicians who understand facial anatomy and set realistic, honest expectations. We do not promise a surgical result — we deliver a considered, non-surgical lift.
Our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town offers advanced ultrasound platforms and covered parking nearby at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
why: LCP-certified physicians plan every HIFU treatment
Multiple platforms — Ultherapy, Ultraformer MPT and LinearZ
Precise depth control for the face, jawline and neck
Central George Town location at Gurney Walk with easy parking
Clear, realistic expectations — no overstated claims
faqs: Is HIFU painful?
Most patients feel brief warmth or a tingling sensation as the energy is delivered. Comfort settings are adjusted to you, and your physician will check in throughout the session.
When will I see HIFU results?
Lifting develops gradually over the weeks and months following treatment as the skin responds. Some patients notice an initial tightening sooner; your physician will set clear expectations.
How long do HIFU results last?
Results vary by individual and typically last many months. A maintenance session can be planned to support the lift over time.
Is there downtime after HIFU?
HIFU usually involves minimal downtime. You may notice mild redness or tenderness for a short period, and most patients resume normal activities the same day.
Where do you offer HIFU in Penang?
Our clinic is at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
procDesc: Non-surgical HIFU ultrasound lifting and skin tightening in George Town, Penang for the face, jawline and neck, performed under physician supervision.
howPerformed: A physician maps the treatment area and delivers focused ultrasound energy at selected tissue depths to stimulate a natural tightening response.
prep: Arrive with clean skin and disclose medications and prior treatments. Your physician will advise on suitability at consultation.
followup: Results build over weeks to months; maintenance sessions are planned individually.
ctaText: Speak with our physicians at Gurney Walk about whether HIFU is right for your skin, and we'll design a non-surgical lifting plan tailored to you.

title: RF Skin Tightening Penang | Radiofrequency Treatment

h1: RF Skin Tightening in Penang | CANVAS Medical Clinic
lead: Radiofrequency skin tightening at our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town — RF energy gently heats the deeper skin to encourage collagen and firmer, smoother texture, with platforms including BTL EMFACE and EXION.
what: Radiofrequency (RF) skin tightening uses controlled heat energy to warm the deeper layers of the skin, encouraging collagen remodelling and a firmer, smoother surface. At CANVAS Medical Clinic in George Town, Penang, RF is a physician-led, non-surgical option for skin laxity and texture.
Our RF platforms include BTL EMFACE, EXION Face, EXION microneedling RF and Jeisys DENSITY — allowing tailored treatment from gentle tightening to combined collagen induction.
how: Consultation. A CANVAS physician assesses your skin laxity and texture and selects the RF platform best suited to your goals.
Controlled heating. The device delivers radiofrequency energy to warm the deeper skin to a target temperature while protecting the surface.
Collagen response. The controlled heat encourages the skin's natural remodelling process over the following weeks.
Series & review. RF is often delivered as a short course; your physician plans sessions and reviews progress.
benefits: Firmer skin
Encourages collagen remodelling for a tighter, more supported appearance.
Smoother texture
Helps refine surface texture and soften the look of fine lines.
Comfortable & non-surgical
A warming sensation with little to no downtime for most patients.
Versatile platforms
From gentle EMFACE toning to EXION microneedling RF for deeper remodelling.

who: • Firm mild skin laxity on the face, jawline or neck
• Improve skin texture and overall tone
• Support collagen with a non-surgical, low-downtime treatment
• Combine RF with microneedling for texture and scarring

Central Gurney Walk location in George Town with easy parking

faqs: Does RF skin tightening hurt?
RF is generally comfortable — most patients describe a warming sensation as the deeper skin is heated. Microneedling RF uses numbing cream for comfort. Your physician adjusts settings to you.
How soon will I see results from RF?
Some patients notice an immediate, subtle tightening, but the main improvement develops over several weeks as collagen remodels. A short course is often recommended.
How many RF sessions do I need?
It varies with your skin and goals. Many protocols involve a series of sessions spaced a few weeks apart; your physician will outline a realistic plan at consultation.
Is there downtime after RF?
Surface RF typically has little to no downtime. Microneedling RF may cause redness for a day or two. Your physician will advise on aftercare beforehand.
Where is your RF clinic in Penang?
We are at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking nearby at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.

howPerformed: A physician delivers controlled radiofrequency energy to heat the deeper skin to a target temperature, encouraging collagen remodelling, optionally combined with microneedling.
prep: Arrive with clean skin and disclose medications. Your physician advises on suitability and any pre-treatment steps at consultation.
followup: Firming develops over several weeks; treatments are usually delivered as a short series with planned reviews.

faqs: Will dermal fillers look natural?
Natural is our standard. Our physicians follow a less-is-more philosophy, placing small, measured amounts to enhance your features rather than change them. The goal is a refreshed, balanced look.
How long do dermal fillers last?

It depends on the product and area. Hyaluronic acid fillers commonly last several months to over a year, while bio-stimulators work gradually over a longer period. Your physician will explain what to expect.
Do filler injections hurt?
Most modern fillers contain anaesthetic, and numbing cream is applied for comfort. Most patients tolerate the treatment well and describe only brief pressure.
Is there downtime after fillers?
Downtime is usually minimal. You may notice minor swelling or bruising for 24–48 hours. We recommend avoiding blood thinners and alcohol for 24 hours beforehand.
Where do you offer dermal fillers in Penang?
Our clinic is at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.

h1: PRP Treatment in Penang | CANVAS Medical Clinic
lead: Platelet-rich plasma therapy at our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town — using a concentrate from your own blood to support skin rejuvenation and hair restoration, performed under physician supervision.
what: PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) therapy uses a concentrate prepared from a small sample of your own blood. The platelet-rich portion contains growth factors that are applied or injected to support the skin's natural renewal. At CANVAS Medical Clinic in George Town, Penang, PRP is physician-led and prepared under sterile, medical conditions.

We use systems such as Cellenis PRP for facial rejuvenation and for scalp treatment as part of a hair-restoration plan. Because PRP is derived from your own blood, it is a regenerative approach tailored to you.
how: Consultation. A CANVAS physician assesses your skin or scalp and confirms whether PRP is appropriate for you.
Blood draw. A small sample of your blood is taken, similar to a routine test.
Preparation. The sample is processed to concentrate the platelet-rich plasma under sterile conditions.
Application. The PRP is injected or applied with microneedling to the target area, then aftercare is reviewed by your physician.
benefits: Natural rejuvenation
Uses your own platelet growth factors to support skin renewal.
Skin quality & glow
May improve tone, texture and a healthy radiance over a series.
Hair restoration support
Scalp PRP is used within a physician-led plan for thinning hair.
Autologous & tailored
Derived from your own blood, prepared under sterile medical conditions.

who: • Improve skin texture, tone and overall radiance
• Soften the appearance of acne scarring or under-eye concerns
• Support thinning hair as part of a restoration plan
• Combine PRP with microneedling for skin renewal

faqs: What is PRP made from?
PRP is prepared from a small sample of your own blood. It is processed to concentrate the platelet-rich plasma, which contains growth factors that support natural skin and tissue renewal.
Is PRP safe?
Because PRP uses your own blood, the risk of an allergic reaction is low. At CANVAS it is prepared under sterile conditions and administered by a physician after screening to confirm suitability.
How many PRP sessions are needed?
PRP is usually delivered as a series — often a few sessions spaced several weeks apart, with maintenance thereafter. Your physician will plan this with you.
Is there downtime after PRP?
You may notice mild redness or minor swelling for a short period, especially when PRP is combined with microneedling. Most patients resume normal activities quickly.
Where do you offer PRP in Penang?
Our clinic is at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
procDesc: Physician-led platelet-rich plasma (PRP) therapy in George Town, Penang for skin rejuvenation and hair restoration, prepared from the patient's own blood under sterile conditions.
howPerformed: A small blood sample is drawn and processed to concentrate platelet-rich plasma, which a physician injects or applies with microneedling to the target area.
prep: Stay hydrated, avoid blood thinners where advised, and disclose medications. Suitability is confirmed through consultation and screening.
followup: PRP is delivered in a series with maintenance; mild redness may settle quickly.
ctaText: Book a consultation at our Gurney Walk clinic and our physicians will assess your skin or scalp and design a regenerative PRP plan tailored to you.

title: Microneedling Penang | Collagen Induction Therapy Georgetown
meta: Microneedling at CANVAS Medical Clinic in Georgetown Penang. Physician-led collagen induction therapy for skin texture, scars and pores, including RF microneedling. Book a consultation.
lead: Collagen induction therapy at our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town — microneedling creates controlled micro-channels to renew skin texture, soften scars and refine pores, with advanced RF microneedling options.
what: Microneedling, also called collagen induction therapy, uses fine needles to create controlled micro-channels in the skin. This prompts the skin's natural repair response, supporting smoother texture and renewed firmness. At CANVAS Medical Clinic in George Town, Penang, microneedling is performed by trained clinicians under physician supervision.

We offer traditional microneedling and advanced EXION microneedling RF, which combines micro-channelling with radiofrequency energy for deeper remodelling — and can be paired with serums or PRP for added renewal.
how: Consultation. A CANVAS clinician assesses your skin concern — texture, scarring or pores — and selects the right microneedling approach.
Preparation. The skin is cleansed and numbing cream is applied for comfort.
Treatment. Fine needles create controlled micro-channels; RF energy is added with EXION for deeper remodelling where indicated.
Recovery & renewal. The skin repairs over the following days; your physician plans a series for progressive results.
benefits: Smoother texture
Encourages collagen for refined, more even-looking skin.
Softer scars
Helps reduce the appearance of acne scarring over a series.
Refined pores
Supports a smoother surface and the look of smaller pores.
Enhanced absorption
Micro-channels can be paired with serums or PRP for added renewal.

faqs: What does microneedling treat?
Microneedling is commonly used for skin texture, acne scarring, fine lines and enlarged-looking pores. Your clinician will confirm whether it suits your concern at consultation.
How many microneedling sessions will I need?
A series is usually recommended — often a few sessions spaced several weeks apart — as collagen renewal builds gradually. Your physician will plan this with you.
Is microneedling painful?
Numbing cream is applied beforehand, so most patients are comfortable. You may feel light pressure or vibration; RF microneedling adds a warming sensation.
Is there downtime after microneedling?
You can expect mild redness, similar to light sunburn, for a day or two. RF microneedling may extend this slightly. Your physician will guide aftercare and sun protection.
Where do you offer microneedling in Penang?
Our clinic is at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
procDesc: Physician-supervised microneedling and collagen induction therapy in George Town, Penang for skin texture, acne scarring and pores, including RF microneedling.
howPerformed: A clinician creates controlled micro-channels in the skin with fine needles, optionally adding radiofrequency energy or serums, to stimulate collagen renewal.
prep: Arrive with clean skin and disclose active skincare and medications. Numbing cream is applied before treatment.
followup: Mild redness settles within a day or two; treatments are delivered as a series for progressive results.
ctaText: Book a consultation at our Gurney Walk clinic and our team will assess your skin and design a microneedling series tailored to your texture and goals.

faqs: How is a medical facial different from a normal facial?

Medical facials use clinical-grade formulations and protocols selected under physician guidance for your specific skin concern, rather than a standard spa routine. The focus is on measurable skin health.
Will a medical peel cause peeling or downtime?
It depends on the protocol. Gentle treatments have little to no downtime, while stronger peels may cause light flaking for a few days. Your clinician will advise based on the protocol chosen.
How often should I have a medical facial?
Many patients benefit from a regular schedule — often every few weeks as a course, then maintenance. Your clinician will recommend a cadence suited to your skin.
Can medical facials be combined with other treatments?
Yes. Facials are often paired with laser toning or planned around injectable and energy-based treatments. Your physician will coordinate a plan that suits you.

whyIntro: At CANVAS Medical Clinic, regenerative therapy is never casual. All protocols — stem cell therapy, exosomes and IV infusion — are physician-led and carried out under strict medical supervision, with eligibility confirmed through screening.
Our Gurney Walk clinic in George Town, Penang provides these advanced therapies within a fully medical environment, with covered parking nearby at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.

faqs: Are stem cell and regenerative therapies safe?

All regenerative protocols at CANVAS are physician-led and carried out under strict medical supervision. Eligibility is determined through consultation and medical screening to ensure each therapy is appropriate and safe for you.
How do I know if I'm suitable for regenerative therapy?
Suitability is assessed individually. A physician reviews your health, history and goals, and medical screening is carried out before any protocol is offered.
What is exosome therapy?
Exosomes are cellular signalling components used within regenerative protocols to support renewal. At CANVAS, exosome therapy is delivered under physician supervision as part of a personalised plan.
What does a stem cell IV infusion involve?
A stem cell IV infusion is administered under medical supervision following screening. Your physician will explain the process, expectations and aftercare in detail at consultation.
Where do you offer regenerative therapy in Penang?
Our clinic is at Gurney Walk — No. 18A, Persiaran Gurney, 10250 George Town, Penang, with covered parking at Gurney Walk and Gurney Plaza.
procDesc: Physician-led stem cell and regenerative therapy in George Town, Penang — mesenchymal stem cell therapy, exosomes and IV infusion under strict medical supervision and screening.
howPerformed: Following consultation and medical screening, a physician designs and supervises a regenerative protocol such as MSC therapy, exosome therapy or stem cell IV infusion.
prep: A full medical history and screening are required. Disclose all conditions and medications; suitability is confirmed before any treatment.
followup: Treatment is supervised with planned follow-up to monitor response within a wider wellness plan.
ctaText: Book a medical consultation at our Gurney Walk clinic and our physicians will assess your suitability and explain whether regenerative therapy is appropriate for you.
